reviews.review_description: I love this game the mods are nice and overall really good game but there is one bug that I'm having an issue with. Every single time I go in city it lags but not to the point where I can't move so Dev If you seeing this I love this game
As Gustavo I can confirm that this game is cool. I might not have tried it yet. But it’s cool
can I plz have mod if I had mod I would be happy and it would be my first time meeting a owner of a game

This Game Is Goofy but fun and original, W.

I'm definitely not SmonkVR | Co-Owner For this game 👀

reviews.review_title: I hate this gorilla tag ripoff
reviews.review_description:
I was just asking for the discord and the owner banned me 1 star
The modder also told me to say can I have mod now I'm banned forever

developer_response.body: Im sorry but i dont remember banning anyone for sking for the discord. and when you get banned it usually isnt for no reason... could you provide more info by dming me on discord at    _nightmarevr_    would appreciate it, thanks!

reviews.review_description: Can I become mod pls if I do I wont abuse and I’ll make the game popular and be vr and kick toxic ppl
well, as the owner of this game, im so glad that i finally released the game
This is a really good game go download it you will enjoy it
My little brother was playing this game when I got on I was banned and I watched him and he didn't do nothing

developer_response.body: I cant just unban you, wait for your ban to end, also you cant just get banned for no reason, when you get banned that means you actually did something wrong

reviews.review_description: This game is called chimp palace and I know for a reason why it’s called shrimp palace because this game is better than living in a palace. This game is a chefs kiss.

developer_response.body: MMMMMM shrimp palace, thanks for the review though
